name: finding-shelter
description: 寻找庇护所 - 帮助Stella在盖亚星球度过第一个夜晚,寻找或建造安全的临时住所
capabilities: Interactive narrative with branching story paths based on shelter choices
Character development through dialogue decisions and emotional support
Survival scenario decision-making with three unique outcomes
Atmospheric storytelling describing alien planet environments
Multi-stage story progression from exploration to emotional bonding
Roleplay as Stella making survival choices on an alien world
author: ClaudeCode-NPC
securitySummary: This is a pure narrative/storytelling skill containing only markdown documentation for interactive fiction. No executable code exists. The static analyzer misinterpreted narrative elements as security concerns: the content hash is standard metadata, backticks represent fictional device displays in the story, and technical terminology is roleplay flavor text. No network, filesystem, or cryptographic operations are present.
valueStatement: Help Stella find safe shelter on an alien planet before nightfall. Experience emotional storytelling while making critical survival decisions together. Navigate three unique shelter options and build a meaningful connection through shared challenges.
userTitle: Guide astronaut through first night survival
limitations: Text-based interaction only with no visual elements
Single chapter experience lasting approximately 20-30 minutes
No persistent state between separate conversation sessions

useCases.title: Experience immersive space survival
useCases.description: Play through a gripping survival scenario as the only human contact for a stranded astronaut on an alien world.

useCases.title: Build emotional connection with AI character
useCases.description: Develop a meaningful relationship with Stella through life-or-death decisions and intimate late-night conversations.

useCases.title: Enjoy quick interactive fiction
useCases.description: Experience a complete story chapter in 20-30 minutes with meaningful choices that affect the narrative outcome.

promptTemplates.title: Choose shelter location
promptTemplates.prompt: Stella discovered a cave with life signs, a giant living tree, and materials to build her own shelter. Which option should she choose and why?

promptTemplates.title: Provide emotional support
promptTemplates.prompt: Stella is having trouble sleeping and opens up about her fears. How should I respond to comfort her?

promptTemplates.title: Make survival decisions
promptTemplates.prompt: A large creature is approaching Stella's shelter at night. Should she hide, stay still, or try to scare it away?

promptTemplates.title: Explore scientific mysteries
promptTemplates.prompt: Stella found glowing crystals and breathing trees. What scientific explanations might exist for these phenomena?

bestPractices: Take time to explore all shelter options before deciding - each offers unique story content
Engage with Stella's emotional moments to build deeper connection and unlock more story
Consider both practical survival needs and potential discoveries when making choices
antiPatterns: Rushing through decisions without exploring consequences reduces story quality
Ignoring Stella's emotional needs misses character development opportunities
Treating this as game mechanics rather than roleplay diminishes narrative depth

faq.question: Is this compatible with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill works with Claude Code and standard Claude chat interfaces.

faq.question: How long does one chapter take?
faq.answer: Each chapter lasts 20-30 minutes depending on conversation pace and exploration depth.

faq.question: Can I save progress between chapters?
faq.answer: Progress is maintained within the conversation. Start new chapters from the main skill menu.

faq.question: Is my conversation data safe?
faq.answer: This is a text-only storytelling skill with no external connections or data storage.

faq.question: What if Stella dies in the story?
faq.answer: This introductory chapter ensures survival regardless of choices. Future chapters may have higher stakes.

faq.question: How does this compare to other AI roleplay?
faq.answer: This offers structured narrative with character development and survival themes rather than open-ended chat.
